name: In Dragon's Wake
description: Early main quest route from Borderwatch/Melve toward Vernworth.
notes: Used to structure the route from Borderwatch to Vernworth.

name: Seat of the Sovran
description: Early Vernworth story step that opens the city/hub context.
notes: Used as prerequisite context for Vocation Frustration.

name: Vocation Frustration
description: Vernworth Vocation Guild quest for unlocking Warrior and Sorcerer through weapon recovery.
notes: Primary quest for first OP power spike.

name: Monster Culling
description: Early Brant quest that can overlap with clearing Trevo Mine.
notes: Optional synergy only; do not force into fast route unless player accepts it.

name: Readvent of Calamity
description: Return-to-Melve dragon attack quest and early Mystic Spearhand opportunity.
notes: Time-sensitive/missable; include as warning in later route engine.

name: The Nameless Village
description: Brant investigation quest leading to Nameless Village.
notes: Useful later for Thief/Maister and eastern Vermund route planning.

name: Flickering Shadows
description: Battahl main quest that can route through Reverent Shrine/Luz.
notes: Used as secondary Trickster unlock context.

name: Put a Spring in Thy Step
description: Volcanic Island escort quest that unlocks Magick Archer through Cliodhna.

name: The Sotted Sage
description: Volcanic Island Camp hot springs quest for Warfarer.
notes: Requires Newt Liqueur; late OP route.

name: A Game of Wits
description: Sphinx riddle questline starting at/near Mountain Shrine.
notes: High-value later route, not part of Fighter OP Fast start.

name: Gift of the Bow
description: First Glyndwr quest that precedes A Trial of Archery.
notes: Added as prerequisite context for Portcrystal quest reward route.

name: A Trial of Archery
description: Glyndwr questline that moves toward Sacred Arbor and can reward a Portcrystal.
notes: Portcrystal reward route; verify timing and prerequisites in playthrough.

name: Feast of Deception
description: Main quest coronation sequence that rewards a Portcrystal and advances the story.
notes: Important route warning: do remaining Vernworth time-sensitive content first.
